buildCommand: npm run build -w @eventrahq/contracts && npm run build -w @eventrahq/frontend

headers.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' https://checkout.razorpay.com; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data: blob: https:; connect-src 'self' https:; frame-src https://api.razorpay.com https://checkout.razorpay.com; frame-ancestors 'none'; base-uri 'self'; form-action 'self'
